<!--
PR title must follow Conventional Commits, e.g. "feat: add reorder policy by index".
It becomes the squash-merge commit and drives versioning + the changelog.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` вАФ new feature
- [ ] `fix` вАФ bug fix
- [ ] `docs` вАФ documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` вАФ no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` вАФ performance
- [ ] `test` вАФ tests only
- [ ] `ci` / `build` вАФ pipeline or build
- [ ] `chore` вАФ maintenance
- [ ] **Breaking change** (`!` / `BREAKING CHANGE:`)

## Testing

<!-- How was this verified? Which suites did you run? -->

- [ ] `dotnet test вА¶UnitTests` passes
- [ ] `dotnet test вА¶FunctionalTests` passes (Docker) вАФ or N/A

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `dotnet build` is warning-free
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `FEATURES.md`) if the public surface changed
